description: An elaborate scene showing an elderly man slumped or dying, surrounded by mourning figures in rich garments. An older man in a golden-brown robe stands behind, while others kneel and grieve. Through an arched opening at the left, a cityscape with a large dome is visible. Flowers and objects are scattered at the base of the scene. A dark-skinned figure appears at the lower left. The architecture behind features arches and decorative elements. The palette is warm golds, reds, and deep browns.
